description_long: This is a disposable coffee cup commonly found in urban environments, featuring a white paper body with visible brown stains and a corrugated cardboard sleeve for insulation. The cup is topped with a black plastic lid that fits snugly, designed to prevent spills while drinking on the go. The cardboard sleeve is ribbed for grip and comfort, and it displays green printed text, partially visible as 'COFFEE COMPANY.' The cup's surface shows signs of use, with several brown stains and smudges scattered across the paper exterior. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing portability and heat protection for hot beverages. The cup is lightweight and sized for single-hand use, making it ideal for takeaway drinks.
description: A stained white disposable coffee cup with a ribbed cardboard sleeve, black plastic lid, and green printed branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cup's black lid, ribbed cardboard sleeve, and some brown stains on the lower paper body.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the start of green printed text 'COFFEE' on the sleeve and a few stains near the rim.
description_view_2: View highlighting the central portion of the sleeve with 'COFFEE COMPA' text and more pronounced stains on the upper paper body.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the green text 'PANY' and additional stains on the lower part of the cup.
